explanations.2: clsx is a utility that combines multiple CSS class names together, useful when you need to conditionally apply classes.
explanations.3: This hook from Docusaurus gives you information about the current blog post, like whether you're viewing a single post or a list of posts.
explanations.10: The useBlogPost hook returns an object with properties; here we're extracting just the isBlogPostPage property using destructuring.
explanations.11: This returns a class name only when we're NOT on the full blog post page (i.e., when we're in a list view), otherwise it returns undefined.
explanations.16: clsx merges the container's margin class with any additional className prop passed in, so both can apply at once.
